# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

<div class="comments-section">
    <h3 class="comments-title">Comments ({{ $comments->count() }})</h3>

    @forelse($comments as $comment)
        <div class="comment-item" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
            <div class="comment-header">
                <div class="comment-author">
                    @if($comment->user->avatar)
                        <img src="{{ asset('storage/' . $comment->user->avatar) }}" alt="{{ $comment->user->name }}" class="comment-avatar">
                    @else
                        <div class="comment-avatar-placeholder">{{ substr($comment->user->name, 0, 1) }}</div>
                    @endif
                    <div class="comment-meta">
                        <strong class="comment-author-name">{{ $comment->user->name }}</strong>
                        <span class="comment-date">{{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                @auth
                    @if(auth()->id() === $comment->user_id || auth()->user()->isAdmin())
                        <div class="comment-actions">
                            <button class="btn-edit" onclick="editComment({{ $comment->id }})">Edit</button>
                            <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment) }}" method="POST" class="delete-form" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this comment?');">
                                @csrf
                                @method('DELETE')
                                <button type="submit" class="btn-delete">Delete</button>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    @endif
                @endauth
            </div>

            <div class="comment-content">
                {!! $comment->content !!}
            </div>

            @if($comment->updated_at->gt($comment->created_at))
                <div class="comment-edited">
                    <small>Edited {{ $comment->updated_at->diffForHumans() }}</small>
                </div>
            @endif

            @if($comment->replies && $comment->replies->count() > 0)
                <div class="comment-replies">
                    @foreach($comment->replies as $reply)
                        <div class="comment-reply" id="comment-{{ $reply->id }}">
                            <div class="comment-header">
                                <div class="comment-author">
                                    @if($reply->user->avatar)
                                        <img src="{{ asset('storage/' . $reply->user->avatar) }}" alt="{{ $reply->user->name }}" class="comment-avatar">
                                    @else
                                        <div class="comment-avatar-placeholder">{{ substr($reply->user->name, 0, 1) }}</div>
                                    @endif
                                    <div class="comment-meta">
                                        <strong class="comment-author-name">{{ $reply->user->name }}</strong>
                                        <span class="comment-date">{{ $reply->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                @auth
                                    @if(auth()->id() === $reply->user_id || auth()->user()->isAdmin())
                                        <div class="comment-actions">
                                            <button class="btn-edit" onclick="editComment({{ $reply->id }})">Edit</button>
                                            <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $reply) }}" method="POST" class="delete-form" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this reply?');">
                                                @csrf
                                                @method('DELETE')
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn-delete">Delete</button>
                                            </form>
                                        </div>
                                    @endif
                                @endauth
                            </div>
                            <div class="comment-content">
                                {!! $reply->content !!}
                            </div>
                            @if($reply->updated_at->gt($reply->created_at))
                                <div class="comment-edited">
                                    <small>Edited {{ $reply->updated_at->diffForHumans() }}</small>
                                </div>
                            @endif
                        </div>
                    @endforeach
                </div>
            @endif

            @auth
                <button class="btn-reply" onclick="toggleReplyForm({{ $comment->id }})">Reply</button>
                <div class="reply-form-container" id="reply-form-{{ $comment->id }}" style="display: none;">
                    <form action="{{ route('comments.reply', $comment) }}" method="POST">
                        @csrf
                        <textarea name="content" rows="3" placeholder="Write your reply..." required></textarea>
                        <div class="form-actions">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">Post Reply</button>
                            <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" onclick="toggleReplyForm({{ $comment->id }})">Cancel</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            @endauth
        </div>
    @empty
        <p class="no-comments">No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
    @endforelse

    @if($comments->hasPages())
        <div class="comments-pagination">
            {{ $comments->links() }}
        </div>
    @endif

    @auth
        <div class="comment-form-section">
            <h4>Leave a Comment</h4>
            <form action="{{ route('comments.store') }}" method="POST" id="comment-form">
                @csrf
                <input type="hidden" name="post_id" value="{{ $post->id }}">
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <textarea name="content" id="comment-content" rows="5" placeholder="Write your comment..." required>{{ old('content') }}</textarea>
                    @error('content')
                        <span class="error-message">{{ $message }}</span>
                    @enderror
                </div>

                <div class="formatting-toolbar">
                    <button type="button" onclick="formatText('bold')" title="Bold"><strong>B</strong></button>
                    <button type="button" onclick="formatText('italic')" title="Italic"><em>I</em></button>
                    <button type="button" onclick="formatText('underline')" title="Underline"><u>U</u></button>
                    <button type="button" onclick="insertLink()" title="Insert Link">Link</button>
                </div>

                <button type="submit" class="btn-submit-comment">Post Comment</button>
            </form>
        </div>
    @else
        <div class="comment-login-prompt">
            <p>Please <a href="{{ route('login') }}">log in</a> to leave a comment.</p>
        </div>
    @endauth
</div>

<style>
    .comments-section {
        max-width: 800px;
        margin: 40px auto;
        padding: 20px;
    }

    .comments-title {
        font-size: 24px;
        margin-bottom: 30px;
        color: #333;
    }

    .comment-item {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 20px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .comment-header {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: flex-start;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
    }

    .comment-author {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .comment-avatar {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        object-fit: cover;
    }

    .comment-avatar-placeholder {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        color: white;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: bold;
        font-size: 18px;
    }

    .comment-meta {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
    }

    .comment-author-name {
        color: #333;
        font-size: 15px;
    }

    .comment-date {
        color: #657786;
        font-size: 13px;
    }

    .comment-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .btn-edit, .btn-delete {
        background: none;
        border: none;
        color: #657786;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 13px;
        padding: 5px 10px;
    }

    .btn-edit:hover {
        color: #1da1f2;
    }

    .btn-delete:hover {
        color: #e0245e;
    }

    .delete-form {
        margin: 0;
        display: inline;
    }

    .comment-content {
        line-height: 1.6;
        color: #14171a;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .comment-content p {
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .comment-content a {
        color: #1da1f2;
        text-decoration: none;
    }

    .comment-content a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }

    .comment-edited {
        margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .comment-edited small {
        color: #657786;
        font-size: 12px;
    }

    .comment-replies {
        margin-left: 50px;
        margin-top: 15px;
        border-left: 2px solid #e1e8ed;
        padding-left: 20px;
    }

    .comment-reply {
        background: #f7f9fa;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 15px;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
    }

    .btn-reply {
        background: none;
        border: none;
        color: #1da1f2;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 13px;
        padding: 5px 0;
        margin-top: 5px;
    }

    .btn-reply:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }

    .reply-form-container {
        margin-top: 15px;
        padding: 15px;
        background: #f7f9fa;
        border-radius: 8px;
    }

    .reply-form-container textarea {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 10px;
        border: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        border-radius: 4px;
        font-family: inherit;
        font-size: 14px;
        resize: vertical;
    }

    .form-actions {
        margin-top: 10px;
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .btn-submit, .btn-cancel {
        padding: 8px 16px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        font-size: 14px;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: none;
    }

    .btn-submit {
        background: #1da1f2;
        color: white;
    }

    .btn-submit:hover {
        background: #1a91da;
    }

    .btn-cancel {
        background: #e1e8ed;
        color: #14171a;
    }

    .btn-cancel:hover {
        background: #d1d8dd;
    }

    .no-comments {
        text-align: center;
        color: #657786;
        padding: 40px 20px;
    }

    .comments-pagination {
        margin-top: 30px;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .comment-form-section {
        margin-top: 40px;
        padding: 20px;
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        border-radius: 8px;
    }

    .comment-form-section h4 {
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        color: #333;
    }

    .form-group {
        margin-bottom: 15px;
    }

    #comment-content {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px;
        border: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        border-radius: 4px;
        font-family: inherit;
        font-size: 14px;
        resize: vertical;
    }

    .error-message {
        color: #e0245e;
        font-size: 13px;
        margin-top: 5px;
        display: block;
    }

    .formatting-toolbar {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
        padding: 10px;
        background: #f7f9fa;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }

    .formatting-toolbar button {
        background: white;
        border: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        padding: 6px 12px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 14px;
    }

    .formatting-toolbar button:hover {
        background: #e1e8ed;
    }

    .btn-submit-comment {
        background: #1da1f2;
        color: white;
        padding: 12px 24px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 4px;
        font-size: 15px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    .btn-submit-comment:hover {
        background: #1a91da;
    }

    .comment-login-prompt {
        margin-top: 40px;
        padding: 30px;
        background: #f7f9fa;
        border-radius: 8px;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .comment-login-prompt a {
        color: #1da1f2;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    .comment-login-prompt a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }
</style>

<script>
    function toggleReplyForm(commentId) {
        const form = document.getElementById('reply-form-' + commentId);
        form.style.display = form.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    function editComment(commentId) {
        window.location.href = '/comments/' + commentId + '/edit';
    }

    function formatText(style) {
        const textarea = document.getElementById('comment-content');
        const start = textarea.selectionStart;
        const end = textarea.selectionEnd;
        const selectedText = textarea.value.substring(start, end);
        
        if (!selectedText) {
            alert('Please select text to format');
            return;
        }

        let formattedText = '';
        switch(style) {
            case 'bold':
                formattedText = '<strong>' + selectedText + '</strong>';
                break;
            case 'italic':
                formattedText = '<em>' + selectedText + '</em>';
                break;
            case 'underline':
                formattedText = '<u>' + selectedText + '</u>';
                break;
        }

        textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + formattedText + textarea.value.substring(end);
        textarea.focus();
    }

    function insertLink() {
        const textarea = document.getElementById('comment-content');
        const start = textarea.selectionStart;
        const end = textarea.selectionEnd;
        const selectedText = textarea.value.substring(start, end);
        
        const url = prompt('Enter URL:');
        if (!url) return;

        const linkText = selectedText || url;
        const formattedText = '<a href="' + url + '">' + linkText + '</a>';

        textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + formattedText + textarea.value.substring(end);
        textarea.focus();
    }
</script>
